summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stripe payment integration and Email OTP verification features. All 8 test scenarios passed successfully. Backend Stripe endpoints (14 tests) and frontend payment flows all working correctly.
test_credentials: Test users created with pattern stripe_test_*@test.com and stripe_biz_*@test.com, password: TestPass123!
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during OTP flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payment integration and OTP verification fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) OTP hardcoded to 123456 (MOCKED - no real email sending). 2) Stripe uses test key sk_test_emergent. 3) All Stripe checkout URLs redirect correctly to checkout.stripe.com. 4) Campaign prices API returns correct values with VAT calculations.

otp_flow_influencer.details: Sign-up form → OTP screen appears → Wrong OTP (111111) shows error → Correct OTP (123456) → Redirects to /influencer-profile

otp_flow_business.details: Sign-up form with Business role → OTP screen → Correct OTP (123456) → Redirects to /profile

stripe_influencer_payment_page.details: Shows Creator Plan £2.99 + £0.60 VAT = £3.59/mo. Pay button redirects to Stripe checkout.

stripe_business_campaign_payment_page.details: Shows 3 duration cards (1 Week £49.99, 1 Month £149.99, 3 Months £349.99). Order summary updates on selection. Pay button redirects to Stripe checkout.

stripe_backend_campaign_prices_api.details: GET /api/stripe/campaign-prices returns correct JSON with 3 durations and VAT calculations

stripe_backend_campaign_checkout.details: POST /api/stripe/checkout/campaign with valid duration returns checkout URL

stripe_backend_invalid_duration.details: POST /api/stripe/checkout/campaign with duration='2_weeks' returns 400 error as expected

mocked_apis.otp_verification: MOCKED - Hardcoded OTP 123456, no real email sending via Resend
mocked_apis.stripe_payments: Using Stripe test key sk_test_emergent - sandbox mode
